hero.headline: Your trusted person in Miami
hero.subheadline: Whether you need help managing your property, evaluating an investment, or taking the next step in Miami, you have someone local to guide the process and follow through.
hero.supportNote: Personalized guidance for international owners and investors.

jacquieTrust.headline: Local guidance for more confident decisions
jacquieTrust.body: Jacquie Zarate supports owners, buyers, and investors who need a trusted person in Miami. Her work combines real estate guidance, personal follow-up, and practical support for people who want to invest, buy, or manage a property from a distance.
trustPoints: Focused on Miami, Sunny Isles, and South Florida.
jacquieTrust.secondaryText: If you are evaluating a property or need help managing one, the first step is a conversation.

propertyManagement.headline: Your Miami property, managed with care and real follow-up
propertyManagement.body: If you have a property for short-term rental, I can help publish it, receive guests, coordinate details, and keep you informed without requiring you to manage the daily operation.
keyPoints: Publishing on platforms such as Airbnb.
Careful guest selection and direct guest attention.
Personalized check-in and follow-up during the stay.
propertyManagement.supportNote: Designed for owners who want to generate rental income with clear follow-up and peace of mind.

process.headline: A simple process so you do not have to manage everything from a distance
process.intro: The goal is for you to know what happens after the first message: we review your property, define the right management approach, and keep real follow-up during the process.

steps.title: We talk about your property
steps.description: You share where it is, its current condition, and what you need to solve as an owner.

steps.title: We define how to manage it
steps.description: We review publishing, guest fit, check-in, rules, and the points where owner approval is needed.

steps.title: I coordinate and keep you informed
steps.description: I support the daily operation, guest attention, and needed repairs with clear follow-up.

midConversion.headline: Want to know if your property can be managed better?
midConversion.body: Write to me and tell me what property you have, where it is, and what you need to solve. The first step can be a simple conversation.
midConversion.note: No pressure. First, we understand your situation.

listingsSupport.headline: Selected properties to understand the market
listingsSupport.body: These listings are a first reference point. If a property interests you, the most important step is to talk and understand whether it truly fits your goal.

items.title: Selected property under review
items.note: Details and images will be validated before publication.

items.title: Real inventory opportunity
items.note: It will be shown with verified information before production.

listingsSupport.note: The selection may change based on availability and market context.

finalCta.headline: Start with a simple conversation
finalCta.body: If you have a property, are considering investing, or simply want to understand where to begin in Miami, write to me and we can look at the best next step.
finalCta.note: Personalized communication in Spanish and English.

hero.headline: Short-term rental management in Miami with real follow-up
hero.body: If you have a property in Miami or South Florida, I can help manage it for short-term rental with local presence, attention to detail, and clear communication throughout the process.

audience.headline: Designed for owners who do not want to manage every detail themselves
audience.body: This service is for owners and investors who want their property to have short-term rental potential, but need someone local to support the daily operation, receive guests, coordinate details, and keep the owner informed.
points: You have a property in Miami or South Florida.
You want to explore short-term rental or Airbnb-style management.
You need local follow-up and clear communication.
You want to stay involved in important decisions.

scope.headline: I can help with the day-to-day management while keeping you informed at each step
scope.intro: The focus is coordinating what the property needs to operate with care, suitable guests, and owner approval when required.
items: Publishing on platforms such as Airbnb.
Using my own contact network when relevant.
Direct guest attention and personalized check-in.
Payment collection and transfer to the owner.
Repair and maintenance coordination with owner approval.

process.headline: A simple process to understand your property and define the next step
steps: We review your property, location, and current situation.
We define what the property needs to operate as a short-term rental.
I coordinate publishing, guests, check-in, and daily follow-up.
I keep you informed and ask for approvals when important decisions come up.

transparency.headline: Management should give you clarity, not distance from your property
transparency.body: The idea is that you do not have to handle every operational detail, while still having clarity about what is happening. Repairs, relevant changes, and important decisions are coordinated with owner approval.
points: No occupancy or profitability guarantees are promised.
Repairs are coordinated with owner approval.
Communication stays clear so you know what is happening.
The goal is peace of mind, care, and real follow-up.

finalCta.headline: If you want to evaluate your property, the first step is a conversation
finalCta.body: Tell me where your property is and what you need to solve. From there, we can see whether this type of management makes sense for you.

hero.headline: Meet Jacquie
hero.body: I'm Jacquie Zarate, originally from Argentina and part of Miami Life Realty. I support international owners, buyers, and investors who need clarity, follow-up, and a local person who responds throughout the process.

accompany.headline: With clarity, follow-up, and a close perspective
accompany.body: My work is not about showing properties without context. First, I understand what you need, where you are in the process, and what decision you want to make. From there, I support you with clear information, personal follow-up, and local presence in Miami.
points: I help you understand the process before moving forward.
I support you if you are buying, investing, or managing a property.
I keep communication clear so you do not have to make decisions blindly.

audience.headline: For people who need someone local before making decisions from a distance
audience.body: I work with owners, buyers, and investors who are looking at Miami from abroad and need reliable guidance. Many want to buy, invest, or manage a property without being present every day.
items: Owners who need support with short-term rental management.
Buyers who want to understand the market before moving forward.
International investors who need local guidance.
People who prefer a clear conversation before a portal full of options.

trust.headline: A local foundation to support you better
points: Website available in Spanish, English, and French (Canada).
Focused on Miami, Sunny Isles, and South Florida.
Personalized attention and follow-up from start to finish.

approach.headline: Understand first, then guide
approach.body: Every person arrives with a different situation. Some want to buy, others want to invest, and others need their property to work better as a short-term rental. My approach is to organize the information, explain real options, and support you so you can decide with more confidence.
approach.note: The priority is not to push you into inventory. The priority is to understand what you need and what the right next step is.

finalCta.headline: If you need local guidance in Miami, start with a conversation
finalCta.body: Tell me what you are evaluating and what you need to solve. From there, we can see how I can help.

hero.title: Pre-construction projects
hero.intro: An initial selection of projects to evaluate with clarity, without rushed decisions or exaggerated promises.

note.headline: Information to confirm
note.body: Project information must be confirmed before making a decision. I can help you review which option makes sense for your situation.

finalCta.headline: Want to evaluate a pre-construction opportunity?
finalCta.body: We can review projects, areas, and current information without rushing the decision or relying on exaggerated promises.

hero.title: Selected properties
hero.intro: Two real properties to read the market with context, without turning the experience into a portal.

labels.statusBadge: Information reviewed. Confirm availability before making a decision.

note.headline: Availability to confirm
note.body: Property information should be confirmed before making decisions. Availability, pricing, and conditions may change.

finalCta.headline: Want to ask about one of these properties?
finalCta.body: We can review whether it is still available, which details should be confirmed, and whether it makes sense for your situation.

summary.headline: A clearer look before moving forward

summaries.3801-s-ocean-dr-2c: A property at The Tides Hollywood Beach to review with context if you are evaluating a purchase near the beach. The confirmed information helps review price, size, building, and key conditions without turning the decision into a cold inventory sheet.
summaries.17801-n-bay-rd-505: A property at Le Frontenac in Sunny Isles Beach to evaluate with a clear look at size, location, and key details. The goal is to understand whether it may make sense for your situation before moving forward.

details.headline: A clear view of the most relevant property details.

verification.headline: Active according to current MLS
verification.body: Property information may change. If you want to move forward, I can review current availability, pricing, and conditions with you.

location.headline: Location
location.body: Property location reference. I can review area context and details with you before moving forward.

cta.headline: Want to review this property with more context?
cta.body: Write to me and we can confirm availability, review current details, and see whether this property makes sense for what you are looking for.

hero.headline: Start with a simple conversation
hero.body: If you have a property, are considering buying or investing, or simply need to understand where to begin in Miami, write to me and we can look at the best next step.

whenToWrite.headline: You can write to me when you need clarity before moving forward
items: You have a property in Miami or South Florida.
You want to manage a property for short-term rental.
You are considering buying or investing.
You do not know where to start and need local guidance.

messageGuide.headline: A first message can be simple
messageGuide.body: To understand your situation better, you can tell me where the property is or which area interests you, what you need to solve, and whether you are an owner, buyer, or investor.
prompts: Property location or area of interest.
Whether you are an owner, buyer, or investor.

channels.headline: Personalized communication in Spanish and English
channels.body: The website experience is available in Spanish, English, and French (Canada). Direct human communication is confirmed in Spanish and English.

finalCta.headline: If you want to move forward, write to me on WhatsApp
finalCta.body: You do not need to have everything defined. The first step can be telling me what you are evaluating.
